/home/dev/vpc/rfc1918.txt.content:
RFC 1918 private IPv4 ranges
----------------------------
10.0.0.0/8        16,777,216 addresses, default for cloud VPCs
172.16.0.0/12     1,048,576 addresses, default for Docker bridges
192.168.0.0/16    65,536 addresses, default for home routers

Any address outside these three blocks is publicly routable and must NOT
be used for an internal VPC CIDR.
